'''euf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:eye|eye]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-?-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eye|eye]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æ?ifith|?æ?ifith]] || [[word:?æ?ifij|?æ?ifij]] || [[word:?æ?ifish|?æ?ifish]] || [[word:?æ?ifi|?æ?ifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?u?ufuth|?a?u?ufuth]] || [[word:?a?u?ufuj|?a?u?ufuj]] || [[word:?a?u?ufush|?a?u?ufush]] || [[word:?a?u?ufu|?a?u?ufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?ufuth|?a?ufuth]] || [[word:?a?ufuj|?a?ufuj]] || [[word:?a?ufush|?a?ufush]] || [[word:?a?ufu|?a?ufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?uffufth|?a?uffufth]] || [[word:?a?uffufj|?a?uffufj]] || [[word:?a?uffufsh|?a?uffufsh]] || [[word:?a?uffuf|?a?uffuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æ?efeth|?æ?efeth]] || [[word:?æ?efej|?æ?efej]] || [[word:?æ?efesh|?æ?efesh]] || [[word:?æ?efe|?æ?efe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?o?ofoth|?a?o?ofoth]] || [[word:?a?o?ofoj|?a?o?ofoj]] || [[word:?a?o?ofosh|?a?o?ofosh]] || [[word:?a?o?ofo|?a?o?ofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?ofoth|?a?ofoth]] || [[word:?a?ofoj|?a?ofoj]] || [[word:?a?ofosh|?a?ofosh]] || [[word:?a?ofo|?a?ofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?offofth|?a?offofth]] || [[word:?a?offofj|?a?offofj]] || [[word:?a?offofsh|?a?offofsh]] || [[word:?a?offof|?a?offof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:?a?ïffïfth|?a?ïffïfth]] || [[word:?a?ïffïfj|?a?ïffïfj]] || [[word:?a?ïffïfsh|?a?ïffïfsh]] || [[word:?a?ïffïf|?a?ïffïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïffïfth|?a?ïf?ïffïfth]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïffïfj|?a?ïf?ïffïfj]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïffïfsh|?a?ïf?ïffïfsh]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïffïf|?a?ïf?ïffïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æ?æfæth|?æ?æfæth]] || [[word:?æ?æfæj|?æ?æfæj]] || [[word:?æ?æfæsh|?æ?æfæsh]] || [[word:?æ?æfæ|?æ?æfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?a?afath|?a?a?afath]] || [[word:?a?a?afaj|?a?a?afaj]] || [[word:?a?a?afash|?a?a?afash]] || [[word:?a?a?afa|?a?a?afa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?afath|?a?afath]] || [[word:?a?afaj|?a?afaj]] || [[word:?a?afash|?a?afash]] || [[word:?a?afa|?a?afa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?affafth|?a?affafth]] || [[word:?a?affafj|?a?affafj]] || [[word:?a?affafsh|?a?affafsh]] || [[word:?a?affaf|?a?affaf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:?a?afatha|?a?afatha]] || [[word:?a?afaja|?a?afaja]] || [[word:?a?afasha|?a?afasha]] || [[word:?a?afaka|?a?afaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:?a?afath|?a?afath]] || [[word:?a?afaj|?a?afaj]] || [[word:?a?afash|?a?afash]] || [[word:?a?afa|?a?afa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:?a?afathal|?a?afathal]] || [[word:?a?afajal|?a?afajal]] || [[word:?a?afashal|?a?afashal]] || [[word:?a?afakal|?a?afakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:?a?afaathatha|?a?afaathatha]] || [[word:?a?afaajaja|?a?afaajaja]] || [[word:?a?afaashasha|?a?afaashasha]] || [[word:?a?afaaka|?a?afaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:?a?afathan|?a?afathan]] || [[word:?a?afajan|?a?afajan]] || [[word:?a?afashan|?a?afashan]] || [[word:?a?afakan|?a?afakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:?a?afathaoro|?a?afathaoro]] || [[word:?a?afajaoro|?a?afajaoro]] || [[word:?a?afashaoro|?a?afashaoro]] || [[word:?a?afakaoro|?a?afakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words a249b1f]]

{{wordpage|e161e0a}}
